tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, low serum protein and globulin, and significant proteinuria, suggesting impaired renal function, likely nephrotic syndrome or advanced chronic kidney disease. Urine findings (protein, glucose, ketones, low specific gravity, acidic pH, brown color) further support renal dysfunction and possible metabolic derangement. No evidence of urinary tract infection. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and further workup.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: Azienda Sanitaria Locale n° 7 Musei
